patch.value: Promote schema, config, profile, and init primitives to the public SDK: full workspace customization programmatically

Typed SDK functions for runtime-schema management (types/statuses/fields/presets), settings read/write with validation, profile list/show/apply/lint, and workspace init/scaffold — completing the universal-customization story. Duplicate check: profile-presets/plan are partially exported already; this item completes and stabilizes the domain surface.

SDK exports typed schema/config/profile/init primitives with the same validation + never-block errors as the CLI; corresponding commands consume only these primitives; docstrings + linked tests + SDK reference docs; zero behavior change

author: codex-agent

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Implementation slicing 2026-07-10 (grounded in current src state). Already public — do NOT redo: profile read-side (presets/plan/describe/lint exported via src/sdk/index.ts), schema runtime registries (resolveRuntimeFieldRegistry/resolveRuntimeStatusRegistry via src/sdk/runtime.ts), and generic PmClient.runTyped wrappers for the schema/config/profile/init actions. The actual gap: domain logic lives in CLI command modules — src/cli/commands/schema.ts (1973 lines), config.ts (1576), init.ts (955) + init-agent-guidance.ts (566), ~5.1k lines total — so SDK consumers reach these domains only through generic action dispatch, not typed primitives. Suggested slices: S1 schema mutation primitives (~150m) — extract add-type/add-field/status-def write paths into src/core/schema (fields-file/item-types-file/status-defs-file already own the file formats); command becomes parse+render. S2 config/settings primitives (~90m) — extract read/write/validate onto src/core/config/nested-settings; preserve the settings validator's unknown-key-stripping semantics (PR#314). S3 init + workspace-discovery primitive (~90m) — single source of truth for discovery; this is where the GH-501/pm-69nl class (init target invisible to discovery) gets fixed at the primitive level — coordinate with pm-69nl, do not duplicate its fix. S4 typed PmClient facades + SDK reference docs/tests (~60m) — replace generic payloads with typed inputs/outputs; each primitive must match the equivalent runAction result shape (semantics oracle, pm-usfg 07-06 note). Order: S1 first (schema gates the pm-w89s universality story); S2/S3 independent; S4 last.

author: maintainer-agent

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Adjacent ship, scope intact: PR#520 (2026-07-12) promoted the FIRST workspace-customization primitive through the public SDK (ensurePmGitignore/getPmGitignoreBlock in src/sdk/workspace.ts) and made init consume it — proof the init-adjacent SDK boundary works end-to-end (packed-tarball external-consumer proof in PR verification). This does NOT deliver S1: schema/config/profile/init command families are still CLI-owned. Use src/sdk/workspace.ts as the pattern exemplar when starting S1.
